title: Chris's Additions
description: This mod adds decorative and building blocks along with other additions.
body:
![Chris's Additions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0eef8102a307550ef9d9eebb83d1bc6012102c7b.png)


# **CHRIS'S ADDITIONS**
### This mod adds decorative and building blocks along with other additions.

## **SOME OF THE STUFF IN THE MOD**
- Chiseled Pillars
- Carved Wood Blocks
- Tables
- Stools
- Cushion Stools
- Chairs
- Cushion Chairs
- Pots
- Vases
- Andesite Blocks
- Granite Blocks
- Diorite Blocks
- Chiseled Blocks
- Ore Brick Blocks
- Planter Pot
- Braziers
- Sconce Torches
- Rose Gold
and more...
